finding_results.notes: June's motives now come through remembered incidents, pressured follow-up, and Lena naming the ugliest motive instead of June delivering one polished theory of herself.

The contradictory October tenth / two-nine-forty version is gone, and the large wire is now aligned to continuity-sheet logic at eighteen twenty-five by combining the pawned ring with the $1,200 tax shortfall. I kept the date at early October rather than inventing a specific unsupported day, since the allowed continuity source canonizes timing but not an exact calendar date.
Both confrontation beats now use distinct observable behavior: June's defensive control in the opening admission and her later triage-style inventory once fallout becomes concrete.

summary: Revised the confrontation so June's jealousy, opportunism, and authorship appetite emerge through pressured anecdote and interruption, replaced repeated unreadability labels with concrete behaviors, and corrected the transfer recap to a continuity-safe early-October wire record without inventing an unsupported exact day.
